시편 112:1.content: Praise Yah! Blessed is the man who fears Yahweh, who delights greatly in his commandments.

시편 112:2.content: His offspring will be mighty in the land. The generation of the upright will be blessed.

시편 112:3.content: Wealth and riches are in his house. His righteousness endures forever.

시편 112:4.content: Light dawns in the darkness for the upright, gracious, merciful, and righteous.

시편 112:5.content: It is well with the man who deals graciously and lends. He will maintain his cause in judgment.

시편 112:6.content: For he will never be shaken. The righteous will be remembered forever.

시편 112:7.content: He will not be afraid of evil news. His heart is steadfast, trusting in Yahweh.

시편 112:8.content: His heart is established. He will not be afraid in the end when he sees his adversaries.

시편 112:9.content: He has dispersed, he has given to the poor. His righteousness endures forever. His horn will be exalted with honor.

시편 112:10.content: The wicked will see it, and be grieved. He shall gnash with his teeth, and melt away. The desire of the wicked will perish.
